description: The generated SystemVerilog pack function for Enum types uses a single-bit `logic'(a)` cast inside a function whose return type is `logic [LP_<NAME>_WIDTH-1:0]`. This is wrong for any multi-bit enum: the cast truncates to 1 bit and the function relies on implicit width extension instead of producing a width-correct value. Fix the codegen so the pack function returns the enum reinterpreted at its declared width (e.g. via `LP_<NAME>_WIDTH'(a)` or equivalent) for both multi-bit and 1-bit enums.
